sample_reviews.title: HP Envy
sample_reviews.snippet: It’s a good product for wfh. The app that goes with it is a bit clunky, but the printer itself (including its scanner) are excellent.

sample_reviews.title: Scammers
sample_reviews.snippet: Do not buy this printer, or any HP printer that ends in an "e" (like the 8015e), unless you want your hardware held hostage by a monthly subscription.
